SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

U.D. CASE P/T JUDGE GEORGE HOFFMAN, RPTR. JOHN LEWIS, CLK. R.CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. STEVEN A. MAC DONALD ATTY. FOR DEFT. IN PRO PERS 2 PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. ALL PRESENT. STIP. FOR JUDGMNT: RESTITUTION OF PREMISES. PLTF. WAIVES ALL BACK RENT. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN ATTY. FEES AND COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION TIL 12/1/94. WRIT MAY ISSUE 11/15/94. NO FURTHER STAYS. THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE. PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND IS ABANDONED. PLTF. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT. VACATE TIMELY WITH NO ELSE IN POSSESSION, PLTF. WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. DOOR BELL IS TO BE FIXED IMMEDIATELY. THE MGR. IS TO STAY AWAY FROM DEFTS.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, WILLIAM CHILDS, ADAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 550 FELL ST. #3, SFCA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGEMENT.
